# @webflow/webflow-cli

## 1.21.0

### Minor Changes

- Add `webflow forms` command group for listing forms and exporting submissions.

  - `webflow forms list --site <siteId>` — list all forms on a site, with `--fields` and `--json` support
  - `webflow forms submissions --site <siteId> --form <formId>` — list form submissions with `--json` support and `--output <file>` for CSV export

## 1.20.2

### Patch Changes

- 6d218e2: Improve CMS command UX based on feedback:

  - User errors (invalid collection or item ID) now display cleanly without a CLI error stack. The message is shown directly and the process exits with code 1 instead of throwing.
  - API errors now include the structured error body from the API response when available, not just the HTTP status.
  - `webflow cms collections create` now shows a next-steps hint after success: how to add fields to the new collection.

- 1c1e18d: Fix duplicate "Credentials saved" output after `webflow auth login`

## 1.20.1

### Patch Changes

- f5355d1: Changed default extension for component files to jsx, when using deprecated webflow devlink sync. File extension still can be configured using fileExtensions property in manifest file.
- 08f6430: The "webflow cloud init" command has been updated to use the new "webflow devlink export" command. The Astro and next.js scaffolds has also been updated to make use of new DevLink features.

## 1.20.0

### Minor Changes

- d77f3b7: Adds global session storage and new auth commands. Running `webflow auth login` now saves credentials to both `~/.config/webflow/auth.json` (macOS/Linux) or `%APPDATA%\webflow\auth.json` (Windows) **and** the project `.env` file (`WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN`), so existing 1.x workflows continue to work without changes. Two new commands: `webflow auth status` shows the currently logged-in user and active scopes; `webflow auth logout` removes the stored session. The `WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN` environment variable continues to work as a CI/CD override.

### Patch Changes

- 067f4cf: Change version flag from `-V` to `-v` for convenience

## 1.19.0

### Minor Changes

- 5567029: Add `webflow devlink export` — generate a static, self-contained DevLink bundle of your Webflow components as local React code that runs without a build-time connection to Webflow.

  - Filter what to export with `components` / `componentGroups` regex patterns in `webflow.json`.
  - TypeScript or JavaScript output, auto-detected from your project (override via `ts`).
  - Optional CSS style isolation (`cssScopes`)
  - Configurable output location with `rootDir`, and rewrite link targets via `relativeHrefRoot` (string prefix or `false` to keep absolute URLs) to fit any project layout.
  - Authenticate via OAuth (interactive) or `WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN` / `--api-token` for CI; target a site with `--site` or the manifest.

### Patch Changes

- 4b1a858: Make code library selection searchable and sorted.

## 1.18.0

### Minor Changes

- a51cd9f: Add `webflow sites` command group with subcommands for managing Webflow sites via the CLI.

  - `sites list` — list all sites in a workspace, with `--fields` and `--json` support
  - `sites get <siteId>` — get details for a specific site
  - `sites domains --site <siteId>` — list custom domains configured for a site
  - `sites publish --site <siteId>` — publish a site to the Webflow subdomain or custom domains, with optional `--page <pageId>` for single-page publishes and `--dry-run` support

- 3323193: Add `--sort-by` and `--order` flags to `assets list` and `cms collections list` commands.

  - `assets list` supports `--sort-by` (displayName, originalFileName, contentType, size, lastUpdated) and `--order` (asc/desc, default asc)
  - `cms collections list` supports `--sort-by` (displayName, slug, lastUpdated) and `--order` (asc/desc, default asc)
  - Site picker now defaults to alphabetical order by display name
  - Invalid flag values produce a clear error message with the list of valid options

## 1.17.1

### Patch Changes

- 3d88fbe: Evaluate code-library bundles with JSDOM-backed `window` / `document` (and related bindings) in scope, so metadata extraction no longer throws when bundles reference browser-only globals at load time.

## 1.17.0

### Minor Changes

- 7026abb: Add `webflow assets` command group with `list`, `upload`, `update`, and `folders` subcommands for managing Webflow site assets via the CLI.
- fcd0c01: Add `webflow devlink bundle` as an alias for `webflow library bundle`.
- 557c7fc: Improve site selection UX: replace plain list with searchable prompt, sort by recently updated, show site slug for disambiguation

### Patch Changes

- 62f928a: DevLink: `global.css` now lives inside the `css/` subfolder of the exported bundle (`devlink/css/global.css`). The Next.js and Astro scaffold imports are updated automatically. If you integrate DevLink output into a custom build, update your CSS import path by one segment.
- 8e687ab: Fix column alignment in CMS list command output — headers now line up with data rows.
- e8eba7f: Replace all `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` usages with `unknown` and proper type casts
- 382788c: Fix no-non-null-assertion ESLint warnings: replace non-null assertions with explicit runtime guards
- 8d43aa4: Fix no-unused-vars ESLint warnings: update ESLint config with underscore ignore pattern, remove dead imports, and prefix intentionally unused variables

## 1.15.1

### Patch Changes

- cb3c6c9: Fix missing cms:read / cms:write OAuth scopes. Users authenticating via `webflow auth login` were getting 403 errors on all CMS commands due to these scopes being absent from the OAuth token request.

## 1.15.0

### Minor Changes

- a67771c: Add `webflow cms` command group for full CMS CRUD via the Webflow API. Commands: `cms collections list/get/create`, `cms fields create`, `cms items list/get/create/update/delete/publish`.

### Patch Changes

- 5b89ddf: Add `webflow devlink import` as an alias for `webflow library share`.
- Updated dependencies [ddda3b7]
  - @webflow/data-types@1.3.0

## 1.14.0

### Minor Changes

- 79b5686: Unifies CLI authentication across all commands (cloud, devlink, library). A single `webflow auth login` now covers every workflow, and credentials are stored as `WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN` in your `.env` file. The previous `WEBFLOW_SITE_API_TOKEN` and `WEBFLOW_WORKSPACE_API_TOKEN` variables still work but will show a deprecation warning — run `webflow auth login` to migrate. Devlink sync now supports interactive OAuth when no token is set.

### Patch Changes

- 31c8d4a: Remove barrel export index file and simplify cleanup to delete entire rootDir folder on full sync (devlink sync command)
- 613ebab: Updated dependencies to patch security vulnerabilities.

## 1.13.1

### Patch Changes

- b02f9d6: Standardize telemetry consent across commands
- 69a7ae9: Corrects path typo in astro template

## 1.13.0

### Minor Changes

- e4f7082: Add --bundler option to choose between webpack (default) and rspack (experimental) for code component library bundling. Note: the library changelog is not accurate when using the rspack bundler.

## 1.12.7

### Patch Changes

- Use caret ranges for @webflow dependencies to allow patch/minor updates
- Updated dependencies
  - @webflow/data-types@1.2.2

### Patch Changes

- 0a575bb: Replace telemetry consent prompts with opt-out notice and add DO_NOT_TRACK environment variable support

## 1.12.4

## 1.12.3

### Patch Changes

- 3b8fa1c: Update all commands to exit with code 1 on errors and improve error logs. Add global `webflow log` command to display logs directory and latest log file path.

## 1.12.2

### Patch Changes

- 51547bc: Fix library bundling error with code component declaration file name starting with a number

## 1.12.1

### Patch Changes

- dbf223b: Support function-based and array bundle config overrides for environment-specific webpack configurations
- b50be36: Streamlined `library bundle` command for faster execution and added `--skip-update-check` global option to skip checking for `@webflow` packages updates.
- Updated dependencies [dbf223b]
  - @webflow/data-types@1.2.1

### Minor Changes

### Patch Changes

## 1.8.47

### Patch Changes

- Updated code components SSR bundle manifest to fix a bug with styles not being server-side rendered correctly
- Added non-interactive mode for `webflow cloud init`. See below for new options:
  - `-n, --project-name <name>` - Project name
  - `-f, --framework <framework>` - Framework (astro, nextjs)
  - `-m, --mount <mount>` - Mount path (defaults to /app)
  - `-s, --site-id <siteId>` - Webflow site ID
- Updated dependencies
  - @webflow/data-types@1.0.2
